2605.07647.title: Quality-Conditioned Agreement in Automated Short Answer Scoring: Mid-Range Degradation and the Impact of Task-Specific Adaptation
2605.07647.paper_summary: Automated short answer scoring (ASAS) is shifting from discriminative, fine-tuned models to large language models (LLMs) used in few-shot settings. This paradigm leverages LLMs broad world knowledge and ease of deployment, but limited task-specific data may reduce alignment on complex scoring tasks. In particular, its impact on scoring partially correct responses that require nuanced interpretation remains underexplored. We investigate the relationship between the degree of task-specific adaptation of different models and quality-conditioned scoring agreement. We compare three LLMs (GPT-5.2, GPT-4o, Claude Opus 4.5) in few-shot mode, a fine-tuned BERT-based encoder, and a human expert on two open-ended biology items, using several hundred student responses and ground truth scores provided by a biology education expert. The results show that human-human agreement is highest and stable across the full quality spectrum. All AI models perform well on fully correct and fully incorrect responses, but exhibit substantial degradation on mid-range responses. This mid-range degradation is conditioned on task-specific adaptation: It is most severe in few-shot LLMs with few examples and decreases as task-specific data increases, with fine-tuned encoder models performing best. This mid-range degradation may lead to inequitable evaluation of responses produced by students with developing understanding. Our findings highlight the importance of quality-conditioned fairness, with particular attention to mid-range responses.
2605.07647.paper_summary_zh: 自動化短答案評分（ASAS）正在從區分性、微調模型轉向在少量樣本設置中使用的大型語言模型（LLMs）。這種範式利用了LLMs廣泛的世界知識和易於部署的特性，但有限的任務特定數據可能會降低在複雜評分任務上的一致性。特別是，它對於需要細緻解釋的部分正確回應的評分影響仍然未被充分探索。我們研究了不同模型的任務特定適應程度與質量條件評分一致性之間的關係。我們在兩個開放式生物學題目上比較了三個LLMs（GPT-5.2、GPT-4o、Claude Opus 4.5）在少量樣本模式下的表現、一個微調的BERT基礎編碼器，以及一位人類專家的表現，使用了數百個學生回應和由生物教育專家提供的真實分數。結果顯示，人類之間的一致性在整個質量範圍內最高且穩定。所有AI模型在完全正確和完全錯誤的回應上表現良好，但在中間範圍的回應上顯示出顯著的退化。這種中間範圍的退化是以任務特定適應為條件的：在只有少量範例的少量樣本LLMs中最為嚴重，隨著任務特定數據的增加而減少，微調的編碼器模型表現最佳。這種中間範圍的退化可能導致對理解發展中的學生所產生的回應的不公平評估。我們的研究結果強調了質量條件公平性的重要性，特別是對中間範圍回應的關注。
2605.07647.author: Abigail Victoria Gurin Schleifer et.al.
2605.07647.authors: Abigail Victoria Gurin Schleifer, Moriah Ariely, Beata Beigman Klebanov, Asaf Salman, Giora Alexandron
